title: Hotdog Minecraft
description: This is a simple mod that has random things added to the game
body:
# full of spagetti code so its gotta be good

## Features
1. Sabscribe Splash Text.
2. Stretched Charecter.
3. Mouse Ears.
4. Super Slippery Block "test:test_block".
5. Custom "/spawner" Command To Spawn Thousands Of Entities (/spawner [player] [entity] [amount]).
6. Infinite Water & Lava (Lava flows as fast as water).
7. Tnt Splits Into 5 Every Time It Explodes.
8. Extremely Powerful Bubble Columns.
9. Extremely Fast Elytras.
10. Everytime You Break A Block A Hotdog Appears On Screen.
